revision.comment: Bot: create category from de/Wikidata
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from dewiki title]] [[de:Category:Erbaut im 15. Jahrhundert v. Chr.]] [[ar:Category:عمارة القرن 15 ق م]] [[commons:Category:15th-century BC architecture]] [[es:Category:Arquitectura del siglo XV a. C.]] [[fa:Category:معماری سده ۱۵ (پیش از میلاد)]] [[hy:Category:Մ.թ.ա. 15-րդ դարի ճարտարապետություն]] [[ko:Category:기원전 15세기 건축]] [[mk:Category:Архитектура од 15 век п.н.е.]] [[no:Category:Arkitektur på 1600-tallet f.Kr.]] [[tr:Category:MÖ 15. yüzyılda mimarlık]]
This category was created from de→Wikidata links on [[Tomb TT353]].

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵.↵" to " "
revision.text:
==Old Content==
==Categories==
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Categories without enwiki]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[ar:Category:عمارة القرن 15 ق م]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Categories without enwiki]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[commons:Category:15th-century BC architecture]] [[de:Category:Erbaut im 15. Jahrhundert v. Chr.]] [[es:Category:Arquitectura del siglo XV a. C.]] [[fa:Category:معماری سده ۱۵ (پیش از میلاد)]] [[hy:Category:Մ.թ.ա. 15-րդ դարի ճարտարապետություն]] [[ko:Category:기원전 15세기 건축]] [[mk:Category:Архитектура од 15 век п.н.е.]] [[no:Category:Arkitektur på 1600-tallet f.Kr.]] [[sn:This category was created from de→Wikidata links on Tomb TT353]] [[tr:Category:MÖ 15. yüzyılda mimarlık]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=15th-century_BC_architecture here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive.
